title: 愛我的人和我愛的人
research_summary: 游鴻明的《愛我的人和我愛的人》是一首情歌，其旋律悠揚而深情，帶著淡淡的哀愁。
color_palette: neutral grey, deep blue, dark red, soft white, muted green
background_prompt: A dimly lit room with a large window overlooking a rainy night sky. The room has minimal furniture and decor, with old photographs scattered on the desk.
outfit_prompt: A character wearing a simple black turtleneck sweater over grey sweatpants, looking slightly disheveled and lost in thought
scene_description: MV 场景设定在一个昏暗的房间内，窗外夜雨绵延。房间内的陈设极其简单，只有一张书桌和一把椅子，桌上散落着一些旧照片和一张未完成的手稿。整个画面以灰、蓝、红等冷色调为主，营造出一种忧郁而略带绝望的情绪氛围。
